properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord of most high You reign in all the earth King of kings, You're crowned in Majesty You hold the moon and stars Oh Lord how great You are You rose in victory, That happened and earth see

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord we glorify, You're the lion and the lamb Lord we glorify, You're the great I am Lord we glorify, Prince of peace You're everything I need

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord we glorify, You sit above the throne Lord we glorify, I exalt Your name alone Lord we glorify, I give my all to You There's nothing you can't do.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All glory, all honor All power, all praise Defender, strong tower Provider, His name is Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: His name is Jesus, His name is Jesus His name is Jesus, His name is Jssus His name is Jesus, His name is Jesus
